zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Cramlington於1316年出生在英國諾圖波藍德可拉苗林頓時，他的父親Richard de Cramlington23歲，母親Mrs. Alice Cramblington21歲。他於大約1355年與Eleanor De Kibblesworth在英國諾圖波藍德可拉苗林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1385年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Cramlington was born in 1316, in Cramlington, Northumberland, England, his father, Richard de Cramlington, was 23 and his mother, Mrs. Alice Cramblington, was 21. He married Eleanor De Kibblesworth about 1355, in Cramlington, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1385, in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Cramlington est né en 1316, à Cramlington, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Cramlington, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alice Cramblington, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor De Kibblesworth environ 1355, à Cramlington, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1385, à Preston, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Cramlington 1316 in Cramlington, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Cramlington 23 und seine Mutter Mrs. Alice Cramblington 21. Er hat um 1355 in Cramlington, Northumberland, England Eleanor De Kibblesworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1385 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Cramlington è nato il nel 1316 nel Cramlington, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Richard de Cramlington, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Alice Cramblington, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor De Kibblesworth circa 1355, nel Cramlington, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1385, nel Preston, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Cramlington(이)가 1316년 영국 노르스벌랜드 크램링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Cramlington(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Alice Cramblington(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1355년 영국 노르스벌랜드 크램링턴에서 Eleanor De Kibblesworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프레스턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Cramlington nasceu em 1316, em Cramlington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Cramlington, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Alice Cramblington, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor De Kibblesworth aproximadamente 1355, em Cramlington, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1385, em Preston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Cramlington родился в 1316 г. в местности крамлингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Cramlington было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alice Cramblington, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor De Kibblesworth около 1355 г. в местности крамлингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1385 г. в местности престон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
